items.name: Iron Shortsword
items.description: A simple iron shortsword favored by new adventurers.

items.name: Longsword
items.description: A standard longsword with a balanced hilt.

items.name: Greatsword
items.description: A heavy two-handed blade that cleaves through armor.

items.name: Silver Longsword
items.description: A longsword with a silver blade, effective against undead and lycanthropes.

items.name: Flametounge Blade
items.description: A sword that crackles with magical flames along its edge.

items.name: Vorpal Sword
items.description: A supernaturally sharp blade said to decapitate on a perfect strike.

items.name: Shortbow
items.description: A lightweight bow for quick shots at medium range.

items.name: Longbow
items.description: A powerful bow that deals devastating damage at long range.

items.name: Elven Recurve Bow
items.description: A gracefully carved recurve bow of elven make. Swift and silent.

items.name: Storm Arrow Bow
items.description: Arrows fired from this bow crackle with lightning energy.

items.name: Arcane Staff
items.description: A wooden staff imbued with minor arcane resonance.

items.name: Staff of Fire
items.description: A staff tipped with a smouldering ember that never goes out.

items.name: Staff of the Archmage
items.description: A legendary staff that amplifies spell power beyond mortal limits.

items.name: Leather Helmet
items.description: A simple leather cap offering minimal head protection.

items.name: Iron Helmet
items.description: A solid iron helmet that protects the head from direct blows.

items.name: Greathelm
items.description: A full-face heavy helm that encases the entire head.

items.name: Circlet of Clarity
items.description: A mage's circlet that sharpens the mind and enhances focus.

items.name: Crown of the Conqueror
items.description: A golden crown radiating authority and battlefield might.

items.name: Padded Armor
items.description: Quilted cloth layered to absorb impacts.

items.name: Chain Shirt
items.description: Interlocking metal rings providing solid torso protection.

items.name: Breastplate
items.description: A fitted metal breastplate that protects the vital organs.

items.name: Plate Armor
items.description: Full plate armor — the pinnacle of mundane protection.

items.name: Dragonscale Armor
items.description: Armor crafted from the scales of a slain dragon. Immune to fire.

items.name: Leather Leggings
items.description: Tanned leather leggings offering basic leg protection.

items.name: Chainmail Leggings
items.description: Linked chainmail offering reliable leg protection.

items.name: Greaves of the Vanguard
items.description: Heavy steel greaves that let you hold the line even under heavy assault.

items.name: Wooden Shield
items.description: A round wooden shield, light but not very durable.

items.name: Iron Shield
items.description: A sturdy iron kite shield that deflects arrows and blows.

items.name: Tower Shield
items.description: A massive tower shield that can shelter your whole body.

items.name: Shield of the Ancients
items.description: A rune-engraved shield said to have protected a legendary king.

effects.description: Once per day, negate one incoming spell.

items.name: Potion of Healing
items.description: A ruby-red liquid that mends wounds when consumed.

items.name: Potion of Greater Healing
items.description: A potent healing brew that closes even serious wounds.

items.name: Potion of Superior Healing
items.description: A legendary tonic that restores life from near death.

items.name: Potion of Strength
items.description: Temporarily increases might for brutal physical feats.

items.name: Potion of Agility
items.description: A shimmering blue liquid that quickens the reflexes.

items.name: Potion of Endurance
items.description: A thick green draught that fortifies the body against punishment.

items.name: Vial of Poison
items.description: A vial of contact poison — coat a blade or throw at enemies.

items.name: Alchemist's Fire
items.description: A thrown flask that ignites on impact, dealing fire damage.

items.name: Elixir of the Warrior
items.description: A golden elixir that temporarily grants the power of a seasoned warrior.

items.name: Scroll of Fireball
items.description: A scroll inscribed with the formula for a fiery explosion.

items.name: Scroll of Lightning Bolt
items.description: A scroll containing crackling lightning runes.

items.name: Scroll of Healing Word
items.description: A scroll with a divine phrase that seals minor wounds.

items.name: Scroll of Haste
items.description: A scroll that briefly doubles the target's speed and actions.

items.name: Scroll of Shield
items.description: An arcane scroll that conjures a magical barrier.

items.name: Ancient Key
items.description: A tarnished iron key covered in glowing runes. Opens the Vault of Echoes.

items.name: Crimson Seal

items.name: Dragon Egg
items.description: A warm, faintly glowing egg. The scholars want this returned immediately.

items.name: The Lost Chronicle
items.description: A crumbling tome containing the final records of the Ashen Order.

items.name: Shattered Amulet
items.description: A broken pendant split in two. Half of something important.

items.description: Standard gold coins, the currency of the realm.

items.name: Silver Coins
items.description: Silver coins worth 1/10 of a gold piece.

items.name: Arrows
items.description: Standard iron-tipped arrows for use with any bow.

items.description: A short blade useful for close-quarters and throwing.

items.name: Handaxe
items.description: A one-handed axe that can also be thrown.

items.name: War Hammer
items.description: A heavy hammer that bludgeons foes with devastating force.

items.description: An impossibly light longsword forged from rare mithral.
